neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.uni: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (u:University {id: after.id}) SET u.name = after.name, u.short_name = after.short_name, u.address = after.address, u.founded_year = after.founded_year', 'MATCH (u:University {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE u', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.ins: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (i:Institute {id: after.id}) SET i.name = after.name MERGE (u:University {id: after.university_id}) MERGE (i)-[:PART_OF]->(u)', 'MATCH (i:Institute {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE i', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.dep: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (d:Department {id: after.id}) SET d.name = after.name MERGE (i:Institute {id: after.institute_id}) MERGE (d)-[:PART_OF]->(i)', 'MATCH (d:Department {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE d', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.spe: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (s:Speciality {id: after.id}) SET s.name = after.name, s.code = after.code', 'MATCH (s:Speciality {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE s', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.dep: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MATCH (sp:Speciality {id: after.speciality_id}) MATCH (d:Department {id: after.department_id}) MERGE (sp)-[r:PART_OF]->(d) SET r.is_primary = after.is_primary', 'MATCH (sp:Speciality {id: before.speciality_id})-[r:PART_OF]->(d:Department {id: before.department_id}) DELETE r', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.lec: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (lc:LectureCourse {id: after.id}) SET lc.name = after.name, lc.semester = after.semester, lc.total_hours = after.total_hours, lc.lecture_hours = after.lecture_hours, lc.practice_hours = after.practice_hours, lc.lab_hours = after.lab_hours, lc.description = after.description MERGE (sp:Speciality {id: after.speciality_id}) MERGE (lc)-[:FOR_SPECIALITY]->(sp)', 'MATCH (lc:LectureCourse {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE lc', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value

WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (l:Lecture {id: after.id}) SET l.title = after.title, l.type = after.lecture_type, l.computer_type = after.computer_type, l.tags = after.tags MERGE (lc:LectureCourse {id: after.course_id}) MERGE (l)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(lc)', 'MATCH (l:Lecture {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE l', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.stu: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (sg:StudentGroup {id: after.id}) SET sg.name = after.name, sg.enrollment_year = after.enrollment_year, sg.curator = after.curator MERGE (sp:Speciality {id: after.speciality_id}) MERGE (sg)-[:FOR_SPECIALITY]->(sp)', 'MATCH (sg:StudentGroup {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE sg', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value

WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (s:Student {id: after.id}) SET s.name = after.first_name + " " + after.last_name + " " + coalesce(after.patronymic, ""), s.card_number = after.student_card_number, s.phone = after.phone, s.email = after.email, s.status = after.status, s.enrollment_date = after.enrollment_date MERGE (sg:StudentGroup {id: after.group_id}) MERGE (s)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(sg)', 'MATCH (s:Student {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE s', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.sch: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MERGE (sch:Schedule {id: after.id}) SET sch.date = after.scheduled_date, sch.start_time = after.start_time, sch.end_time = after.end_time, sch.classroom = after.classroom, sch.week_start_date = after.week_start_date, sch.teacher_name = after.teacher_name MERGE (l:Lecture {id: after.lecture_id}) MERGE (sch)-[:PART_OF]->(l) MERGE (sg:StudentGroup {id: after.group_id}) MERGE (sg)-[:CONTAINS]->(sch)', 'MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: before.id}) DETACH DELETE sch', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.att: WITH event.payload.after AS after, event.payload.before AS before, event.payload.op AS op CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(op,'d') <> 'd', 'MATCH (s:Student {id: after.student_id}) MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: after.schedule_id}) MERGE (s)-[:SHOULD_ATTEND]->(sch) WITH s, sch, after CALL apoc.do.when(coalesce(after.is_present, false) = true, "MATCH (s:Student {id: after.student_id}) MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: after.schedule_id}) MERGE (s)-[:ATTENDED]->(sch)", "MATCH (s:Student {id: after.student_id}) MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: after.schedule_id}) MATCH (s)-[r:ATTENDED]->(sch) DELETE r", {after: after}) YIELD value RETURN value', 'MATCH (s:Student {id: before.student_id})-[r1:SHOULD_ATTEND]->(sch:Schedule {id: before.schedule_id}) DELETE r1 WITH s, sch MATCH (s)-[r2:ATTENDED]->(sch) DELETE r2', {after: after, before: before, op: op}) YIELD value RETURN value
